assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends Extended release channel with detailed explanation of 24-month support period and manual control over minor upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Shows specific gcloud command with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades and explains it allows control plane security patches but blocks disruptive upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Configures maintenance window for Saturday 2-6 AM with specific gcloud command and 4-hour duration

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Creates separate node pools: h100-training for GPU workloads and system-workloads for non-GPU workloads, with detailed architecture explanation

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Shows applying no_upgrades exclusion specifically to the H100 training pool and provides operational runbook for manual upgrade management between training campaigns

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Includes YAML example with extended terminationGracePeriodSeconds for checkpointing and shows kubectl checkpoint commands in the operational runbook

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Provides specific section on GPU Driver Compatibility with commands to create staging node pool and test CUDA compatibility before upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Includes section on Compact Placement for RDMA with commands to maintain RDMA topology after upgrades and mentions RDMA preservation in the summary
